name: vendor.myndhyve.ads-studio-core
description: MyndHyve Ads Studio core — four pure-logic executors lifted from src/canvas-types/campaign-studio/nodes/adsStudioPack/. ads.brief.build (CreativeBriefBuilder), ads.variant.plan (VariantPlanService), ads.video.qa (VideoQAService), ads.winner.synthesize (WinnerSynthesisService). All four executors are deterministic — no host capabilities required beyond the core NodeContext. Marks the Phase A pilot of the canvas-type executor migration per openwop/openwop#11.
author: MyndHyve

nodes.label: Ads Brief Build
nodes.description: Builds a CreativeBrief from manual input, AI-assisted authoring, or by extending an extracted AdBrief with structured creative fields. Three modes: manual, extraction (extend base brief), merge (partial overlay).

nodes.label: Ads Variant Plan
nodes.description: Plans creative variants for an ad campaign — creates a variant plan from axes + constraints, generates the cartesian product, applies balanced/focused truncation strategies, and emits slugs per the naming convention. Pure deterministic generation.

nodes.label: Ads Video QA
nodes.description: Quality-assurance checks on video storyboards — text legibility (reading speed + scale), safe-zone compliance, duration limits, text density, claims policy. The Platform-spec registry + compliance-bridge integrations are optional; callers inject safeZones/videoSpec/checkClaimsFn via inputs when needed.

nodes.label: Ads Winner Synthesize
nodes.description: Synthesizes winning creative from A/B test results — generates aggregate stats, insights (winner/no_winner/low_data/trend), next-test suggestions (priority-ordered by dimension), and a markdown report. Deterministic — no AI calls.
